auth.name: Name
auth.offlineFirst: Offline-first • Your data is stored locally
auth.tooManyAttempts: Too many attempts. Please wait 1 minute before trying again.
auth.tooManyPasswordResetAttempts: Too many password reset attempts. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again.
auth.tooManyVerificationAttempts: Too many verification requests. Please wait 15 minutes before trying again.
auth.passwordMinLength: Password must be at least 8 characters
auth.hCaptchaFailed: hCaptcha verification failed. Please try again.

verifyEmail.title: Verify Your Email
verifyEmail.description: Please verify your email address to continue using TapShift.
verifyEmail.sentTo: We've sent a verification link to
verifyEmail.checkSpam: Didn't receive the email? Check your spam folder.
verifyEmail.emailSent: Verification email sent! Please check your inbox.
verifyEmail.pleaseWait: Please wait while we verify your email address...
verifyEmail.wrongAccountDescription: This verification link is for a different email account.
verifyEmail.step1: Log out from your current account
verifyEmail.step2: Log in with the account that received the email
verifyEmail.step3: Click the new verification link in your email
verifyEmail.invalidOrExpired: The verification link is invalid or has expired.

settings.title: Settings
settings.firstDayDescription: Sets the first day of the week in calendar views
settings.dateTimeDescription: Controls how dates and times are displayed
settings.editOnStop: Open edit form when stopping timers
settings.editOnStopDescription: When enabled, stopping a timer will open the edit form so you can add notes immediately.
settings.autoToggle: Stop all timers when starting a new one
settings.autoToggleDescription: When enabled, starting a timer will stop all other running timers.
settings.recalculateDescription: Recalculates all balance data from timelogs. This will mark existing balances as deleted and create new ones.

dashboard.title: Dashboard
dashboard.createFirst: Create your first timer to start tracking time

timer.name: Timer Name
timer.autoSubtractBreaksDescription: Automatically subtract break time based on German work rules

history.title: History
history.noData: No time logs for this period

forgotPassword.title: Forgot Password
forgotPassword.description: Enter your email address and we'll send you a link to reset your password.
forgotPassword.emailSent: If an account with that email exists, a password reset link has been sent.

resetPassword.title: Reset Password
resetPassword.logoutFirst: To reset your password, logout first.

import.title: Import Data
import.description: Import your time tracking data from a file

export.title: Export Data
export.description: Export your time tracking data to a file
